name: ARD Broadcast Position
description: A narrow section of the western approach where ARD's equipment van is parked — cables running to a camera position on the bridge railing, a portable monitor showing the live feed, and a radio relay unit connecting to the Hamburg transmission center. This is the point from which the world will watch the gate open.
atmosphericDetails: The portable monitor showing the camera's live feed — the eastern gate visible as a bright rectangle in the fog, the crowd a dark mass pressing against it
The radio relay unit's amber transmission light, currently dark — Hamburg has not yet cleared the Liveschaltung authorization
The sound of the radio earpiece: fragments of the Hamburg studio feed, the AP wire ticker, and the field producer's voice giving countdown estimates that keep being revised
